throughput.name: Throughput
throughput.tooltip: Find the maximum rate at which the DUT can forward frames with zero packet loss using binary search.

latency.name: Latency
latency.tooltip: Measure round-trip packet delay at various loads and frame sizes.

frameLoss.name: Frame Loss
frameLoss.tooltip: Measure packet loss percentage across different offered load levels.

backToBack.name: Back-to-Back
backToBack.tooltip: Test maximum burst capacity - how many frames at line rate before drops occur.

systemRecovery.name: System Recovery
systemRecovery.tooltip: Measure time to recover normal forwarding after sustained overload condition.

reset.name: Reset
reset.tooltip: Measure time from device restart to when it resumes forwarding traffic.

config.name: Configuration Test
config.tooltip: Validate service configuration meets SLA parameters before deployment.

performance.name: Performance Test
performance.tooltip: Long-duration test (15-30 min) to verify sustained performance meets SLA.

full.name: Full Test
full.tooltip: Complete Y.1564 test sequence: configuration validation followed by performance test.

forwarding.name: Forwarding Rate
forwarding.tooltip: Measure maximum frame forwarding rate per switch port.

caching.name: Address Caching
caching.tooltip: Determine maximum number of MAC addresses the switch can cache.

learning.name: Address Learning
learning.tooltip: Measure how quickly the switch learns new MAC addresses.

broadcast.name: Broadcast Latency
broadcast.tooltip: Measure latency for broadcast frame forwarding across all ports.

congestion.name: Congestion Control
congestion.tooltip: Test switch behavior under traffic congestion conditions.

capacity.name: TCP Capacity
capacity.tooltip: Measure achievable TCP throughput considering all network impairments.

efficiency.name: Transfer Efficiency
efficiency.tooltip: Calculate ratio of useful data transfer to total bandwidth consumed.

path.name: Path Analysis
path.tooltip: Analyze path characteristics including RTT, BDP, and bottleneck location.

delay.name: Frame Delay
delay.tooltip: Measure one-way frame delay using synchronized timestamps.

loss.name: Frame Loss Ratio
loss.tooltip: Calculate frame loss ratio over measurement interval.

slm.name: Synthetic Loss
slm.tooltip: Measure loss using synthetic test frames (SLM/SLR).

loopback.name: Loopback
loopback.tooltip: Verify MEP-to-MEP connectivity using loopback messages.

performance.name: MEF Performance
performance.tooltip: Verify service meets MEF SLA performance objectives.

full.name: Full Test
full.tooltip: Complete MEF test including configuration and performance phases.

timing.name: Gate Timing
timing.tooltip: Verify Time-Aware Shaper gate scheduling accuracy.

isolation.name: Traffic Isolation
isolation.tooltip: Verify traffic class isolation between scheduled and best-effort flows.

latency.name: Scheduled Latency
latency.tooltip: Measure worst-case latency for scheduled traffic classes.

full.name: Full Suite
full.tooltip: Run all TSN tests to validate Time-Sensitive Networking configuration.

stream.name: Custom Stream
stream.tooltip: Generate custom traffic patterns with configurable frame size, rate, and duration.

burst.name: Burst Mode
burst.tooltip: Generate burst traffic with configurable burst size and gap.

multistream.name: Multi-Stream
multistream.tooltip: Generate multiple concurrent traffic streams with different parameters.
